title: vangueria macrocalyx
intro: Vangueria macrocalyx, also known as the "Buffalo Horn" plant, is a shrub-like species belonging to the Rubiaceae family. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Vangueria macrocalyx include its use in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. The plant can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its therapeutic properties.
